summary: All documentation gaps for the action-based conditions feature have been filled. XML doc comments added to all 4 production files (if.cs, compare.cs, IEvaluator.cs, DefaultEvaluator.cs). Architecture docs updated: modules.md condition section expanded with if/compare details, README.md file tree updated with providers/ subtree, good_to_know.md updated with __condition__ signal pattern and type normalization notes. CHANGELOG entry drafted. PLang .goal examples are deferred (builder prompt not yet updated) — not blocking.

changes.description: Added XML docs on If class, all 5 properties, and Run() method including error key documentation
Added XML docs on Compare class, all 3 properties, and Run() method
Added XML docs on IEvaluator interface, Evaluate() with exception docs, IsTruthy() with truthiness rules
Added XML docs on DefaultEvaluator class and inheritdoc on both methods
Expanded condition module entry with if/compare details, sub-step mode, pluggable evaluator, supported operators
Added condition/providers/ subtree to file structure showing if.cs, compare.cs, IEvaluator.cs, DefaultEvaluator.cs
Added two sections: __condition__ signal pattern (why MemoryStack, thread safety, nesting) and type normalization rules

findings.issue: No PLang .goal examples exist for the new condition format
findings.detail: Builder prompt (BuildGoal.llm) not yet updated to generate Left/Operator/Right. Examples can't be validated until then. Tracked separately.
